name: editor-application-set-state
title: Editor / Application / Set State
description: Control the Unity Editor application state. You can start, stop, or pause the 'playmode'. Use 'editor-application-get-state' tool to get the current state first.

parameters.name: isPlaying
parameters.description: If true, the 'playmode' will be started. If false, the 'playmode' will be stopped.

parameters.name: isPaused
parameters.description: If true, the 'playmode' will be paused. If false, the 'playmode' will be resumed.
